APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT VIA COURTCALL. AFTER ARGUMENT, THE COURT FINDS GOOD CAUSE TO GRANT DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL DUE TO THE UNAVAILABILITY OF A PARTY BECAUSE OF EXCUSABLE CIRCUMSTANCE. THE TRIAL DATE OF 10/19/20 IS CONTINUED TO 3/29/21 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. ANY MOTION TO RE-OPEN DISCOVERY AND ISSUE REGARDING LIQUIDATING OF ASSETS SHOULD BE MADE BEFORE DEPARTMENT 302. THE COURT DID NOT RECEIVE COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOTION WHICH IS IN VIOLATION OF SF LOCAL RULE 2.7B. THE COURT ORDERS DEFENDANT TO PAY $60.00 FILING FEE FOR THE CONTINUANCE WHICH IS THE COST FOR FILING PAPERS THAT DEFENDANT WOULD HAVE TO FILE AGAIN WITH A COURTESY COPY IN ORDER TO GET THE 3/29/21 TRIAL DATE.
